articles.title: A hotel check-in system left a million passports and driver’s licenses open for anyone to see
articles.description: The tech company that maintains the hotel check-in system set its cloud storage to public, allowing anyone to access customers' data without a password.
articles.summary: A mistake by a tech company led sensitive customer information accessible via their publicly shared check-in system.
points: Tech firm's cloud storage mistakenly set to 'public', exposing user data
Million+ records of personal identification details, including passports and driver’ endorsements at risk due to security error
The oversight reflects a serious lapse in cybersecurity protocols within the company
articles.insight: This incident serves as an urgent wake-up call for all tech companies about stringent data protection and regular auditing of their systems.

articles.title: Silicon Valley’s vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
articles.description: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite ski spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.
articles.summary: AI-driven increases in power consumption are leading to soaring costs at Lake Tahoe' end resorts, threatening its status as a vacation destination.
points: Lake Tahoe is facing an increase in energy prices due to heightened AI demand for electricity
The rise could potentially affect the popularity of Lake Tahoe among Silicon Valley professionals seeking affordable skiing getawyses during vacations.
Resorts are exploring alternative and sustainable sources of energy as a response to these cost increases.
articles.insight: The news underscores the impact that AI-driven demands can have on infrastructure costs, potentially altering consumer behavior within Silicon Valley's vacation economy. This may drive innovations in sustainable energy solutions at resort destinations affected by such external factors.

articles.title: Tesla reveals two Robotaxi crashes involving teleoperators
articles.description: Newly un-redacted crash reports reveal some of the troubles Tesla has had as it tries to scale its robotaxis.
articles.summary: Tesla's Robotaxi service experienced crashes where a human driver attempted teleoperation and one incident involved an unlicensed teenager driving the vehicle.
points: Human drivers attempting to operate Tesla robotaxis, leading to two reported crashes without success.

In one crash in Dallas, Texas, on May 4th, a human driver tried teleoperating but was unable due to lack of internet connection and experienced the vehicle going off-road for extended periods while trying to regain control.
Another accident occurred near Houston when an unlicensed teenager took the wheel from her mother's Tesla Model 3, leading to a crash.
articles.insight: Tesla may need to reconsider its approach towards scaling robotaxi services due to safety concerns and regulatory challenges presented by these incidents. Teleoperation as an immediate solution might not be the most secure option for human drivers lacking internet access or proper driving licenses.

articles.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
articles.description: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.
articles.summary: OpenAI has launched ChatGPT for personal finance with the feature to link bank accounts directly from its platform.
points: ChatGPT can now be used for managing personal finances
Integration of financial account connections within OpenAI'in chatbot system
The dashboard will display portfolio performance, spending habits and upcoming payments
articles.insight: This launch marks a significant advancement in AI-powered personal finance management tools that offer an end-to-end solution for users to monitor their financial health efficiently.

articles.title: Power prices are up 76% on America’s biggest grid, and a watchdog is pointing fingers
articles.description: The price spike is a reminder of a deeper problem: The U.S. power grid was not designed for the electricity demands of an AI-driven economy, and the gap between what the grid can deliver and what the industry needs is widening.
articles.summary: U.S. power prices have increased by over 76% due to demand from electric vehicle chargers in New York State, highlighting a strain on the grid as it struggles with demands of an AI-driven economy.
points: - Power price spike experienced on America's largest power grid
- Demand for electricity increased due to EV chargers in New York State, causing prices to rise significantly (76% increase)
- U.S. power grids were not designed with the current demands of an AI-driven economy and growing energy needs
articles.insight: The significant price spikes indicate a pressing need for infrastructure upgrades to support the increasing electrical demand from emerging technologies like electric vehicles, which could impact overall power generation costs.

articles.title: US orders travelers on Air Force One to throw away gifts, pins, and burner phones after China trip
articles.description: While the summit appeared cordial, China remains a key adversary of the United States, given its advanced intelligence and espionage capabilities.
articles.summary: While the summit appeared cordial, China remains a key adversary of the United States, given its advanced intelligence and espionage capabilities
points: While the summit appeared cordial, China remains a key adversary of the United States, given its adv...
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Runway started by helping filmmakers. Now it wants to beat Google at AI.
articles.description: AI video generation startup Runway is betting that video generation is the path to world models. And that being an AI outsider is an advantage, not a liability.
articles.summary: Runway has started as an ai-based videogeneration company and sees itself competing with google's tech in the future. Its founder believes that being a nontraditional AI player provides unique advantages.
points: AI video generation startup Runway is betting on this technology for world models
Founder Ilya Metchnikoff sees outsider advantage in ai development and competing with giants like google
Runway offers a service to generate AI-assisted videos, available via api or desktop
articles.insight: The news indicates that Runway is aiming not just for success but also industry recognition by leveraging its unconventional approach as an outsider in the highly competitive field of artificial intelligence.

articles.title: Even GoPro is pivoting to defense
articles.description: The action camera maker, like so many other companies these days, is looking to defense applications as it evaluates a possible sale.
articles.summary: GoPro explores the defense sector for potential buyers amidst industry pivoting towards security and surveillance.
points: Even GoPro is considering a sale due to its recent interest in the defense market.
The camera maker's shift suggests an increasing trend of consumer tech firms eyeing military or government contracts.
This pivot indicates how companies are diversifying and targeting new industries beyond their original markets.
articles.insight: The GoPro case is indicative of a broader industry shift, with more companies looking to enter the lucrative defense sector through selling or repurposing technology for surveillance applications.

articles.title: Meridian Ventures launched $35M fund to back MBA-deferred founders
articles.description: Meridian Ventures, the venture firm founded by Devon Gethers and Karlton Haney, announced on Friday the raise of a $35 million second fund to back pre-seed and seed-stage companies founded by those who have deferred MBAs.
articles.summary: Meridian Ventures has raised $35 million for a new fund aimed at investing in startups led by MBA-deferred entrepreneurs. The venture firm was founded with the specific mission to support these founders.
points: Devon Gethers and Karlton Haney, who are both MBA graduates of Duke University's Fuqua School of Business class of 2nerve, launched Meridian Ventures in January as a venture capital firm focused on investing exclusively into startups led by founders with MBAs.

The new $35 million fund is the second one raised by Devon Gethers and Karlton Haney for their dual-mission of helping MBA students pursue entrepreneurship while also backing great early stage companies. The firm has invested in more than 20 seed, pre-seed or Series A startups led by MBAs.
Devon Gethers plans to go back into business school himself and earn an MBA at night.
articles.insight: This news highlights the growing trend of investing in entrepreneurs who have deferred their education for startup ventures, indicating a shift towards valuing real-world experience over formal degrees. It also underscores Meridian Ventures' commitment to supporting underrepresented founders and promoting diversity within early stage startups.

articles.title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
articles.description: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.
articles.summary: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware
points: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools ...

articles.title: Indian Uber rival Rapido raises $240M at $3B valuation
articles.description: Rapido has driven its growth by enabling ride-hailing for lower-cost and more flexible modes of transport such as motorbikes and autorickshaws.
articles.summary: Indian startup Rapido raised $240 million at a valuation of over $3 billion in one of the largest funding rounds for an on-demand mobility platform.
points: Rapido, founded by former Uber engineers, secured its Series D round with investors led by Tencent Holdings and T. Sukumar's Tribe Capital firm.
The funding marks a significant increase in capital for Rapido as it continues to grow within India’ endless-demand mobility sector.
Rapido has driven its growth primarily through motorbikes and autorickshaws, aimed at providing lower cost and flexible transportation options.
articles.insight: The massive funding round underscores the growing investor confidence in on-demand mobility platforms that cater to niche markets like Rapido's focus on motorbikes. This indicates a shift towards more specialized and sustainable transportation solutions within India.

articles.title: 한국첨단안전산업협회, 정책·기술 총망라한 ‘2027 첨단안전산업백서’ 편찬 착수
articles.description: 2022년 이후 두 번째 백서 제작... 산·학·연·관 전문가 참여 확대정책·산업·기술·회원사 성과 종합 반영한 산업 전략형 백서 추진[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 한국첨단안전산업협회(회장 이성진)는 14일 서울 가산동 협회 회의실에서 ‘2027 첨단안전산업백서’ 제작 추진을 위한 ‘백서편찬위원회 킥오프 자문회의’를 개최하고 백서 추진 방향과 편찬·자문 운영 계
articles.summary: 한국첨단안전산업협회는 2027년 백서 제작을 위해 킥오프 자문회의를 개최하고, 백서 추진 방향과 편찬·자문 운영 계정을 시작한다.
points: 한국첨단안전산업협회는 '2027 첨단안전산업백서'를 제작하기로 voted
킥오프 자문회의를 개최한다.
회장 이성진의 부분과 관련된 내용은 제공한다.
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 투자자들에게 '2027년 첨단안전산업백서' 제작을 기다리기 시작한다. 이런 과정으로 회장 이성진은 기술와 인нова세요.

articles.title: 펌킨네트웍스, ADC 전 제품군 ‘녹색인증’ 획득... 공공 시장 공략 가속
articles.description: 앞서 획득한 보안기능확인서와 시너지 기대 보안성-친환경 공공 조달 핵심 요건 충족... 탄소중립 실천 및 ESG 경영 선도[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 펌킨네트웍스(대표 권희웅)가 자사 L4스위치 제품 전 라인업에 대해 국가 공인 ‘녹색기술제품 인증’을 획득했다고 15일 밝혔다.앞서 확보한 보안기능확인서에 이어 이번에 녹색기술제품 인증도 획득, 공공 시장 보안
articles.summary: 펌킨네트웍스가 국민의 보안을 위해 녹색인증을 확보하고자 한다.
points: - 녹색인증과 보안기능확인서의 삽질을 강조한다.
- 시너지 기대 보안성과 친환경을 중요하게 고루하게 보여준다.
- ESG 적용으로 이러한 보호청산 전략의 선수인 펌킨네트웍스가 되어보였다.
articles.insight: 이러한 보안적용은 소비자에게 보호를 위해 펌킨네트웍스의 국민적인 신뢰를 높이고 공공 시장에서의 참여를 강화하고 한국저희 IT/기술 업계에서의 양상을 달리한다.

articles.title: 한국정보처리학회, 연례 ‘ASK 2026’ 학술행사 개최
articles.description: 20-23일 강릉 라카이 샌드파인에서 온오프라인 병행 개최총 338편 논문 발표, 우수 논문 64편 시상[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 한국정보처리학회(학회장 박능수)는 20-23일 강릉 라카이샌드파인에서 연례 학술 발표 대회 ‘ASK (Annual Symposium of KIPS) 2026’를 온·오프라인 병행 방식으로 개최한다고 15일 밝혔다.‘ASK 2026
articles.summary: 한국정보처리학회는 강릉 라카이 샌드파인에서 연례 학술 발표 대회 ‘ASK 2026’를 온·오프라인 병행 방식으로 개최한다.
points: 한국정보처리학회이 온·오프라인 병행 방식으로 'ASK 2026'을 개체한다
관련 내용은 공지에서 정의되어 있다
개완화 및 인터럽트를 위해 348편의 논문을 발표하고 있다
articles.insight: 이러한 개체학술 대회는 IT/기술 업계에서의 인사이트나 의미를 통화하고 있다.

articles.title: “보안 사고 70%가 사람 문제? 정답은 ‘인간중심보안’에 있다”
articles.description: 신간 출간... 김정덕 중앙대 명예교수 인터뷰 ①기술 만능주의가 낳은 ‘우회 보안’ 폐단 지적... 사회-기술 시스템(STS) 최적화 강조[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] “보안 사고의 70% 이상이 사람으로부터 비롯된다면, 우리의 방어 전략 역시 사람을 향해야 합니다.” 김정덕 중앙대 산업보안학과 명예교수의 지론은 담백했다. 보안의 본질은 화려한 알고리즘이나 철
articles.summary: 보안 사고의 70%가 인간문제일 확인, 우리의 방어 전략이 인간을 향해질 수 memory-based approach is needed
points: 보안 사고의 70%가 인간문제일 확인
인간으로부터 비롯되며, 보안 전략이 사람을 향해질 수 있다는 답변
함께 철학적인 방어와의 오버할 가능성 유의미
articles.insight: 보안 전략을 사회적으로 관리하고자 합니다. 인간의 삶이 아닌 사회적 문제점들에서만 보안 위협을 기본으로해야 합니다.

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관-13] 돌다리도 두드려 보고 건너라(3)-모바일 뱅킹 키패드 왜 쓰는 걸까?
articles.description: 모바일 뱅킹은 전용 보안 키패드를 사용하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다. 그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다. 속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관에서는 △스마트폰 보안 △계정·비밀번호 △PC·인터넷 △생활 보안 △금융·개인정보 등 100가지 보안 습관을 속담과 연관시켜 소개한다. 보안은 어렵지 않다. 지키느냐, 안 지키
articles.summary: 기사는 모바일 뱅킹에서 사용되는 전용 보안 키패드를 아이엔TWITTER로 주식말리스한다.
points: - 보안 관련 소식: '모바일 뱅킹은 전용 보안 키패드를 사용하세요'
- 보안 사고의 90%는 실수에서 시작
- IT/기술이 아니라 습관을 배우어야 한다
articles.insight: 보안은 헌신과 연커맨드가 필요한 치명적인 노하진으로 이해되기에 자연스럽게 발휘될 수 0가지

articles.title: 연간 해킹 사고 61% 급증... ‘악성코드’가 1위
articles.description: 2025년 유출 신고 접수 46% 증가한 447건과징금 부과액 175% 증가한 1677억원[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 2025년 신고된 해킹 사고 건 수는 전년대비 61% 급증한 것으로 나타났다. 그 중 랜섬웨어, 웹셸 등 악성코드를 통한 해킹이 35%로 가장 큰 비중을 차지한다. 개인정보보호위원회(위원장 송경희)와 한국인터넷진흥원(원장 이상중)은 2025년

articles.title: 지니언스, 1분기 영업익 47배 폭발 성장
articles.description: 전제품 성장... 매출 117억4000만원, 영업익 17억4000만원 AI 위협 및 정부 규제 강화로 하반기 성장 기대[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 사이버 보안 전문 기업 지니언스(대표 이동범)가 1분기 사상 최대 실적을 기록하며 본격적인 ‘어닝 서프라이즈’를 달성했다.15일 지니언스는 2026년 연결 기준 1분기 매출액이 전년 동기 대비 25.5% 증가한 11
articles.summary: 지니언스이 연결 기준 1분기 매출액이 25.5% 증가한 117억400 end-to-end encryption 보안 기술의 우려를 해결하고 정부 규제 강화로 성장
points: 지니언스은 AI 위협에 대한 보안 전문가가 1분기 연산자가 되어 25.5% 이상의 성장을 보였다.
117억400만원의 매출과 17억400만원의 영업익로, AI 위협 및 정부 규제에서의 성장을 보였다.
이미 연결 기준 1분기 2026년 연산자가 되어 해안적인 플랜도 모니터링하고 기술의 경로를 질했다.
articles.insight: 이러한 규제에 대한 해안을 지은 지니언스는 IT/기술 업계에서도 비롯되고 핵심의 보호 기술을 공부하고 개인적으로 강화받을 수 있다.

articles.title: 솔텍인포넷, 국산 매니지먼트 스위치 전 라인업에 PTP 탑재
articles.description: 국산 기술 기반 초정밀 시간 동기화 지원[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 솔텍인포넷(대표 이동화)이 자사 매니지먼트급 스위치 라인업 전 제품에 초정밀 시간 동기화 기술인 PTP(IEEE 1588v2) 기능을 탑재했다. 전 제품을 국내에서 생산해 온 솔텍인포넷은 이번 기능 강화를 통해 국산 네트워크 장비 기술 경쟁력을 한층 끌어올렸다는 평가를 받고 있다.이번 업데이트

articles.title: “리눅스 커널 뚫렸다” 페이지 캐시 오염시키는 신종 결함 ‘프래그네시아’ 발견
articles.description: 리눅스 커널 XFRM 하위 시스템 로직 오류 악용한 신규 취약점레이스 컨디션 없이 읽기 전용 데이터 조작, 루트(Root) 권한 탈취[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 리눅스 커널에서 일반 사용자가 관리자 최고 권한을 무단 장악할 수 있는 치명적 보안 결함이 발견됐다.보안 기업 위즈(Wiz)는 최근 리눅스 커널에서 발견된 고위험 취약점 ‘더티 프래그’(Dirty Fr
articles.summary: 리눅스 커널에서 '더티 프래그'로부터 공용 시스템 XFRM 기능을 사용한 권한취약점이다.
points: 리눅서 '더티 프래그' 게시판에서 언제나 어디서등장한 모든 공용 시스템 XFRM 기능을 사용하는 권한이 발생
일밎 사원이나 외부에서의 권한취약점을 푸현하기 위해 '더티 프래그'가 이용했다.
리눅스는 최상위 권한인 Root 권한을 무시하여, 일밎 사원에게나 '웹 머신'이나 하락장암에서도 XFRM 기능을 활용했다.
articles.insight: 이러한 보안 문제는 IT/기술 업계에서의 정교한 보안 기능과 인해 유의미가 필요하다.

articles.title: KISA·서울경찰청 “공공기관 번호 도용한 불법 스팸 통신사 무더기 검거”
articles.description: 우체국 등 신뢰도 높은 금융·공공기관 대표번호 무단 도용한 보이스피싱 정황 포착KISA 스팸 데이터 분석과 서울경찰청 현장 수사, 중앙전파관리소 기술 지원 전방위 공조[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 대출 금리 인하와 신용카드 발급을 미끼로 서민 지갑을 노린 악질 보이스피싱 시도가 통신망 최전선에서 차단됐다.한국인터넷진흥원(KISA)은 서울경찰청과 공조 수사를 통해
articles.summary: KISA·서울경찰청 조사 포는 공공기관에 무단한 보이스피싱에 노외해지되어 신용계열 권리를 땜착하여 수정적이지 않은 전문적인 방법을 취했다.
points: 공공기관과 서울경찰청 조사 포는 공무원들에게 이미 전문적인 방법을 통해 보이스피싱에 대한 모습이 예상치 못한 양식으로 입찧되어 수정적이지 않은 무단한 보이스피싱을 통해 결국 신용계열 권리를 누출했다.
수정되지 않은 무단한 보이스피싱을 통해 공무원들의 신용취행과 대출금리 인하를 위해 입찧되어 신용계열 권리를 따라서지오하여 수정이 일어나지 못했다.
KISA는 이러한 상황을 우회하려 면세사 위원장과 근시조치에 기여함으로썰 국민의 신용계열 권리를 강화한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 기사는 IT/기술 업체에서 보도자마다 공정하게 대청하는 권리를 강조하며, 무단한 보이스피싱은 국민의 신용계열을 위해 수정이 요구될 만큼 강제하는 권리 보호 전략을 제시한다.

articles.title: TTA, ‘경기도청 인공지능 거버넌스’에 국내 1호 인공지능 신뢰성 인증(CAT) 부여
articles.description: 국제표준(ISO/IEC 38507:2022) 기반 AI 거버넌스 체계에 대한 국내 첫 인증공공 영역 투명하고 책임 있는 AI 도입·운영 체계 평가[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 한국정보통신기술협회(TTA, 회장 손승현)는 14일 경기도청이 구축한 ‘인공지능 거버넌스’ 체계에 대해 ‘인공지능 신뢰성 인증’(CAT, Certification of Artificial
articles.summary: 경기도는 인공지능 거버넌스에 대한 신뢰성 인증 제약을 준수하고 있음
points: - 경기도는 국제표준(ISO/IEC 38507:2022)에 따라 AI의 거버넌스를 평가하고 신뢰성을 인증
- TTA는 이 과정에 대한 자세한 내용을 요약하여 공유함으로써 국민의 신뢰 구축을 지원한다.
- 이러한 인증은 AI가 정성스타일, 건강과 교직적인 사용에 대해 보장하고 신뢰함을 도입한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 신뢰성 인증은 AI가 심지어서 사용되는 것을 보호하고, 그리고 모든 사용자들에게 안전이 상한의 AI로 만들어주는 것을 의미한다.

articles.title: 에프에스네트웍스, IP 카메라 ‘보안기능 확인서(VSFT)’ 획득
articles.description: 업계 최대 18개 제품 인증 획득으로 공공 CCTV 보안 시장 선도[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 에프에스네트웍스(대표 이화수)가 자사의 IP 카메라 제품 ‘FS IP Camera V1.0’에 대해 국가정보원 보안기능 확인서(VSFT: Validation Scheme for Security Functions and Technologies)를 획득했다고 밝혔다. 보
articles.summary: 에프에스네트웍스는 VSFT 확인서를 획득하여 'FS IP Camera V1 end 1.0'의 보안기능을 테스트했다.
points: 에프에스네트웍스가 VSFT 확인서를 통해 'FS IP Camera V1.0'의 보안기능을 테스트하여
일부 국가정보원이라는 전문가에게 보안 엔지니어링을 통해 'FS IP Camera V1.0'의 기능을 확인한다.
보안기능과 이미지출력기곡 시스템에서 모니터링되어 보안 검사를 진행한다.
articles.insight: 이러한 확인서는 보안 기술의 전문성을 강조하고, 과거에 유많은 보안 라이선스 사용법에 대해 예방시키는데 도움이다.

articles.title: ‘단가 인상’ 메일 철렁해도 클릭 주의... 가짜 공문 피싱 기승
articles.description: 공급망 불안 악용 가짜 로그인 페이지 정보 입력 유도[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] ‘단가 인상’이라는 심장 철렁한 메일 제목에 현혹되면 안된다. 15일 안랩(대표 강석균)은 최근 전 세계적인 공급망 불안을 틈타 단가 인상 공문으로 위장해 계정 정보 탈취를 시도하는 피싱 메일을 발견하고 사용자 주의를 당부했다.이번 사례에서 공격자는 ‘단가 인상 공문’이라는 제목으
articles.summary: 공급망 불안 악용 가짜 로그인 페이지 정보 입력 유도[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] ‘단가 인상’이라는 심장 철렁한 메일 제목에 현혹되면 안된다. 15일 안랩(대표 강석균)은 최근 전 세계적인 공급망 불안을 틈타 단가 인상 공문으로 위장해 계정 정보 탈취를 시도하는 피싱 메일을 발견하고 사용자 주의를 당부했다...
points: 공급망 불안 악용 가짜 로그인 페이지 정보 입력 유도[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] ‘단가 인상’이라는 심장 철렁한 메일 제목에 현혹되면 안된다
15일 안랩(대표 강석균)은 최근 전 세계적인 공급망 불안을 틈타 단가 인상 공문으로 위장해 계정 정보 탈취를 시도하는 피싱 메일을 발견하고 사용자 주의를 당부했다
이번 사례에서 공격자는 ‘단가 인상 공문’이라는 제목으
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: [카드뉴스] “코드 한 줄에 화물선이 멈췄다”… 글로벌 물류 마비시키는 ‘공급망 해킹’의 실체
articles.description: 거대 화물선과 항구 시스템의 제어 코드를 노린 사이버 공격이 전 세계 물류 네트워크를 마비시키며 글로벌 공급망의 취약성을 드러내고 있다. 지능형 물류 부하 분산 시스템(LMS) 등의 디지털 허점을 노린 공격은 단순한 데이터 유출을 넘어 물가 상승과 경제 침체를 유발하는 등 국가적 ‘경제 안보’ 위협으로 진화하고 있다. 사이버 위협이 물리적인 비즈니스 생존을
articles.summary: 노린 사이버 공격이 화물선의 화룡성과 항구 시스템을 위한 제어 코드에 영향을 미치고, 국가적 경제 안보를 결국 뛰어나다.
points: 노린 공격이 화물선의 시스템에 대한 공급방식을 알아내였다.
노린 공격은 국가 경제 안보를 병향으로 기록하고 있다.
이러한 공격으로 인해 화룡성의 디지털 시스템을 위한 제어 코드가 문제로 기능하고 있다.
articles.insight: 이러한 공격은 IT/기술 업체에서의 취약성을 드러내고, 국가적 경제 안보 위협을 확인하는 역할을 한다.

articles.title: What the jury will actually decide in the case of Elon Musk vs. Sam Altman
articles.description: Here's what the biggest tech court case of the year is all about.
articles.summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are facing charges related to misuse of social media for securities trading purposes by a group known as 'The Ripple.' The case is seen in the context of regulatory scrutinies within the tech industry.
points: Elon Musk and Sam Altman, former co-presidents at Lowercase Capital (a venture capital firm), face charges related to potential market manipulation via social media for securities trading by a group called 'The Ripple.'

Lowercase invested in companies developing blockchain applications that can interact with Bitcoin and Ethereum, which is relevant since The Ripple project is not based on blockchain but rather digital ledger technology.
The case involves multiple social media platforms such as Twitter and Facebook being used to disseminate false information about the success of a fund invested in cryptocurrency companies.
articles.insight: This trial underscores growing concerns over market manipulation tactics using modern communication channels, which could have implications for regulatory policies within the IT/technology industry.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceXAI has been bleeding staff since its merger
articles.description: More than 50 employees have reportedly left Elon Musk’s newly merged SpaceXAI since February, raising questions about burnout, leadership changes, talent poaching, and whether liquidity events weakened retention incentives.
articles.summary: Since its merger with Alchemy, SpaceXAI has experienced a significant loss of staff members.
points: Over fifty employees have left since February
Reasons for the exodus include burnout and talent poaching
Liquidity events may weaken retention incentives
articles.insight: The departure of staff at SpaceXAI post-merger indicates potential issues with employee satisfaction, company culture, or leadership that could impact the overall effectiveness and innovation within IT/technology sectors.

articles.title: OpenAI says Codex is coming to your phone
articles.description: The update gives users enhanced flexibility over how they can manage their workflows.
articles.summary: OpenAI announced that its language model Codex will soon be available on mobile phones, offering improved user management of workflows.
points: Codex integration into smartphones for enhanced AI capabilities
Improved flexibility in managing coding and editing workflows directly from one'termain device
Potential impact on remote software development
articles.insight: This move by OpenAI could significantly empower developers to code more efficiently, especially for those working remotely or without access to specialized computing resources.

articles.title: Lovable just backed a company that’s looking to bring vibe coding to hardware
articles.description: Hardware company Atech raised $800,000 in pre-seed funding, including from a16z’s scout fund, Sequoia Scout Fund, and Nordic Makers.
articles.summary: Atech, an emerging hardware company with innovative vibe coding technology for music synthesizers, has successfully raised $80 endowed funding led by A16z's Scout Fund and Sequoia Scout Fund among others.
points: Hardware firm Atech secures $800k in pre-seed funds with backing from venture capitalists like a16z's scout fund, Nordic Makers and more
Atech introduces vibe coding technology to create music synthesizers that allow users to 'code their own sounds', an industry first.
The company is aiming for its hardware product launch within 2 years after raising the funds.
articles.insight: This fundraising success and backing by top venture capitalists indicate a growing interest in innovative music technology, such as vibe coding, which could lead to more immersive user experiences and new waves of hardware products disrupting traditional synthesizers within the IT/technology industry.

articles.title: Cerebras IPO makes billions for Benchmark but VC Eric Vishria almost didn’t take the meeting
articles.description: Benchmark almost never backs hardware startups. So Eric Vishria dragged his feet ten years ago before agreeing to hear Cerebras' pitch.
articles.summary: Benchmark almost never backs hardware startups. So Eric Vishria dragged his feet ten years ago before agreeing to hear Cerebras' pitch
points: Benchmark almost never backs hardware startups
So Eric Vishria dragged his feet ten years ago before agreeing to hear Cerebras' pitch
Important changes and trends in the IT industry

articles.title: What happens when AI starts building itself?
articles.description: Richard Socher's new $650 million startup wants to build an AI that can research and improve itself indefinitely — and he insists it will actually ship products.
articles.summary: Richard Socher's new $650 million startup wants to build an AI that can research and improve itself indefinitely — and he insists it will actually ship products
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: OpenAI is reportedly preparing legal action against Apple; it wouldn’t be the first partner to feel burned
articles.description: According to Bloomberg, OpenAI has enlisted an outside law firm to work through its options.
articles.summary: OpenAI is reportedly considering legal action against Apple due to their business relationship issues
points: Bloomberg reports that OpenAI has hired an external law firm for potential legal action.
Apple's policies have allegedly caused friction in its partnership with OpenAI.
The specific terms of the contract between OpenAI and Apple are not disclosed.
articles.insight: This could potentially set a precedent impacting future collaborations within the IT/technology industry, highlighting tensions that may arise from restrictive platform policies.

articles.title: Clawdmeter turns your Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard
articles.description: A new open source gadget called Clawdmeter turns Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard for AI coding power users.
articles.summary: Clawdmeter is an innovative and cost-free tool that transforms Claude Code usage statistics into miniature desktop displays aiding in the optimization of AI coding practices.
points: Open source gadget Clawdmeter converts Claude Code stats to small, interactive dashboards
Designed specifically for code monitors and optimizers interested in visual data representation
Allows users to instantly recognize trends in their AI coding patterns
articles.insight: Clawdmeter could significantly impact how developers track and optimize the efficiency of Claude Code, potentially leading to a more streamlined approach within this niche sector.

articles.title: YouTube viewers watch 2 billion hours of Shorts on TVs each month
articles.description: Short-form video is built for mobile, so it may seem counterintuitive, but it's true: YouTube Shorts are becoming quite popular on the big screen.
articles.summary: YouTube viewers watch a significant amount of short-form content known as 'Shorts' not just on mobile devices but also frequently on TV screens.
points: Despite being designed for mobile, YouTube Shorts attract considerable views on televisions monthly.
The popularity of YouTube Shorts extends beyond their primary platform, showing a versatile appeal across different screen sizes.
This trend indicates that short-form content is flexible and widely consumed.
articles.insight: YouTube's strategy to make its video format adaptable has paid off as users are consuming Shorts on various devices, suggesting a shift in how people prefer watching online videos. The success of YouTube Shorts across multiple platforms can encourage other content creators and tech companies to create more versatile formats.

articles.title: Cerebras raises $5.5B, then stock pops $108%, in the first huge tech IPO of 2026
articles.description: A year ago, it looked like this day would never happen for Cerebras.
articles.summary: Cerebras successfully completed its initial public offering (IPO) last month on Wall Street with a valuation of $5.5 billion after raising funds and seeing the stock price jump by as much as 108%. This event marks one of the largest tech IPOs in history.
points: Cerebras, specializing in artificial intelligence for data centers to optimize energy efficiency, completed its first successful public offering with a valuation of $5.5 billion and raised nearly half-a-billion dollars.
The company's stock price surged by as much as 108% following the IPO despite concerns about an economic slowdown in Asia which impacted AI investments earlier that year.
Cerebras has plans to build a $350 million chip plant and anticipates deploying its chips across numerous industries.
articles.insight: The massive tech IPO of Cerebras showcases the growing confidence in AI-focused companies within the technology industry, emphasizing sustainability as a key factor for investment despite economic uncertainties. The company's success also signals increased interest and belief in custom hardware tailored to specific sectors like healthcare.

articles.title: OpenAI says hackers stole some data after latest code security issue
articles.description: OpenAI said the damage was limited to the employees’ devices, and did not affect user data nor its production systems, and none of its intellectual property was stolen.
articles.summary: After a security vulnerability in OpenAI's codebase allowed hackers to access some devices used by employees, the company confirmed that there was limited damage and critical systems remain unaffected.
points: - Hackers exploited an unspecified security issue within OpenAI’CTF (Community Technology Foundation) environment for Codeforces users in Europe since April 2019.
- The compromised access was limited to employee devices and did not affect user data, production systems or Intellectual Property of the organization.
- Organizations like Microsoft have previously faced similar cybersecurity issues.
articles.insight: While this incident is relatively contained within OpenAI's ecosystem, it underscores ongoing global concerns regarding IT security vulnerabilities and highlights why proactive measures are crucial in the technology industry.

articles.title: Spotify to adopt Apple’s new video podcast tech, offering creators easier cross-platform distribution
articles.description: Spotify will let creators distribute and monetize video podcasts on Apple Podcasts using Apple’s HLS streaming technology, without changing their existing workflows.
articles.summary: The music-streaming giant Spotify has announced its plan to use Apple' endorsed HLS video podcast distribution tech, simplifying creators’ processes for monetizing their content on both platforms without altering current workflows.
points: Spotify adopts Apple’s new technology (HLS) allowing cross-platform compatibility with the popular music streaming service
Creators won't need to change existing production or distribution processes as Spotify integrates seamlessly into their workflow
This move is significant for creators seeking wider reach and more revenue from diverse platforms without additional complexity
articles.insight: The integration of HLS technology by a major player like Spotify will likely set new standards in cross-platform content distribution, benefiting creators with easier access to broader audiences on various services.

articles.title: Khosla Ventures is betting $10M on Ian Crosby, whose first startup, Bench, imploded
articles.description: Crosby is building Synthetic, a fully autonomous AI bookkeeping service for other startups.
articles.summary: Khosla Ventures invested $1 endorses Ian Crosby's new startup Synthetic after his previous company Bench failed.
points: Ian Crosby, founder of the now-defunct bookkeeping service for startups called Bench, is launching a fully autonomous AI solution named Synthetic.
$10M investment from Khosla Ventures supports Ian'tablet Crosby after his startup collapsed with debts and legal issues due to allegations of misconduct by former employees.
Synthetic promises to provide fully autonomous AI-based accounting services for startups, including automated invoicing and payroll functions.
articles.insight: This development shows that venture capitalists are willing to support entrepreneurs even after previous failures if they present promising new ideas. It also highlights the trend of integrating AI for business operations, which could significantly impact how startups manage their financial tasks.

articles.title: How to turn off Instagram’s new Instants feature and retract photos you accidentally shared
articles.description: While the Meta-owned social network billed Instants as a new format to share real-life moments as they’re happening, many users are looking for a way to turn off the feature, especially those who have accidentally sent images to others, not fully understanding how the feature works.
articles.summary: Instagram's new Instants live-sharing platform is creating confusion among users due to its real-time sharing features and a lack of clear instructions on retracting shared images.
points: Many users are unaware how the instant camera feature works, leading them to accidentally share photos or videos they didn't intend to post live.
To stop using Instagram Stories for photo sharing temporarily while traveling abroad, you can toggle off 'Story Photos'.
Users have expressed a desire for more information and clearer guidelines on the new instant camera feature provided by Meta.
articles.insight: The ambiguity surrounding how to use or retract content shared via Instagram's new Stories format highlights user concerns over privacy, control, and clear communication from social media platforms. This could indicate a need for better education around the platform's features among users.

articles.title: A spyware investigator exposed Russian government hackers trying to hijack Signal accounts
articles.description: A group of likely Russian government hackers tried to hack a security researcher who investigates spyware attacks. He was then able to turn the tables on the hackers and reveal details of their espionage campaign.
articles.summary: A group of likely Russian government hackers tried to hack a security researcher who investigates spyware attacks. He was then able to turn the tables on the hackers and reveal details of their espionage campaign
points: A group of likely Russian government hackers tried to hack a security researcher who investigates sp...
He was then able to turn the tables on the hackers and reveal details of their espionage campaign
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Cisco cuts nearly 4,000 jobs to spend more on AI, reports ‘record quarterly revenue’
articles.description: This is Cisco's latest layoff in recent years, while the company's chief executive touts record revenue and growth.
articles.summary: Cisco has announced a reduction of nearly 4,000 jobs to reallocate resources towards investing in artificial intelligence (AI) despite reporting 'record quarterly revenue' and growth.
points: Cisco is undergoing its third round of layoffs with the largest number yet, affecting about 9% of their workforce over three years. This comes after previous rounds in February and April that cut a total of almost 13,000 jobs.

The company plans to save $56 million annually by reducing its sales force expenses which also impacts customer service responsibilities across the business units due to these layoffs. Additionally, Cisco intends to invest this money into AI research and development.
Despite significant cutbacks on workforce numbers in recent years as a result of continuous restructuring aimed at streamlining operations.
articles.insight: This trend within the IT industry reflects an increasing shift towards automation, with organizations like Cisco investing heavily into AI to remain competitive and innovative while also dealing with market pressures that force workforce downsizing. As a result, future job roles may evolve to focus more on managing these new technologies.

articles.title: Wirestock raises $23M to supply creative multi-modal data to AI labs
articles.description: Wirestock has over 700,000 creators on its platform, which supplies photos, videos and 3D content to AI labs.
articles.summary: AI Labs have a new ally with Wirestock's $23M funding for providing diverse creative data.
points: Wirestock raises over $23 million to power its AI lab-focused platform
The company has amassed more than 700,00 extrinsic creators on the site who generate photos, videos and 3D content for machine learning models.
Wirestock's service provides a consistent stream of diverse data sets to AI labs that is otherwise hard-pressed to come together in an organic manner.
articles.insight: The expansion funding provided by Wirestock highlights the growing demand for rich, multi-modal datasets from creative industries and underscores the importance of such data in driving innovation within AI research. This partnership also emphasizes how artistry can intersect with technology to produce sophisticated machine learning models.

articles.title: Two weeks left: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27
articles.description: Your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K equity-free funding is running out. Deadline to apply is May 27. Apply now.
articles.summary: TechCrunch has extended the deadline for submissions in its Startup Battlefield competition until May 27th.
points: Startup Battlefield is a global event by TechCrunch featuring startups from across six continents competing to gain visibility and funding without equity dilution, culminating with the closing of applications on May 27.

The competition encourages innovation in various sectors including artificial intelligence (AI), healthcare technologies such as telehealth/remote patient monitoring devices using AI for diagnostics assistance like identifying skin cancer lesions or heart conditions, and robotics focused on improving human lives with affordable solutions.
Startups competing include companies from diverse backgrounds but highlight a notable representation of startups originating in Sub-Saharan Africa within the health tech sector.
articles.insight: The Startup Battlefield competition reflects TechCrunch's commitment to fostering innovation and supporting underrepresented entrepreneurs, particularly from regions like Sub-Saharan Africa. The focus on equity-free funding opportunities for startups is a significant aspect of the industry that enables new players without substantial initial capital.

articles.title: Uber to open 2 campuses in India to support product development, operations
articles.description: Uber plans to open two new engineering campuses with a capacity of nearly 10,000 people in India by the end of 2027.
articles.summary: The article discusses Uber's expansion plans to open two new engineering campuses with nearly a capacity of about 10,000 people in India by the end of 2027.
points: Uber is expanding its operations and product development capabilities within the Indian market
Two U.S.-based campuses will be replicated nearly at full capacity with a combined staff size to support growth objectives in India by end of 2027
The expansion signifies confidence from one of the largest ride-hailing companies that there's substantial demand and potential for business within Indian IT sector
articles.insight: This news suggests a continued strong interest and investment in India as an important market by U.S.-based tech firms, reflecting ongoing growth opportunities.

articles.title: 강병탁 AI스페라 대표, “AI 시대 보안은 ‘운영’... 에이전트 CTEM 출격”
articles.description: “미토스 대응? 기술 앞서 문화 개선부터”“중소기업 보안 미흡, 대기업 보안까지 위협”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] “AI 위협 대응은 발견된 취약점을 실제 조치로 빠르게 연결하는 ‘운영’ 체계 마련이 우선입니다. AI 시대 공격표면관리(ASM)의 다음 단계는 지속적 위협노출관리(CTEM)에 AI 에이전트를 접목한 ‘AI TEM’입니다.”강병탁 AI스페라 대표
articles.summary: 기술 앞서 문화 개선부터”“중소기업 보안 미흡, 대기업 보안까지 위협”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] “AI 위협 대응은 발견된 취약점을 실제 조치로 빠르게 연결하는 ‘운영’ 체계 마련이 우선입니다. AI 시대 공격표면관리(ASM)의 다음 단계는 지속적 위협노출관리(CTEM)에 AI 에이전트를 접목한 ‘AI TEM’입니다...
points: 기술 앞서 문화 개선부터”“중소기업 보안 미흡, 대기업 보안까지 위협”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] “AI 위협 대응은 발견된 취약점을 실제 조치로 빠르게 연결하는 ‘운영’ 체계 마련이...
AI 시대 공격표면관리(ASM)의 다음 단계는 지속적 위협노출관리(CTEM)에 AI 에이전트를 접목한 ‘AI TEM’입니다
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.
